response.justification: The candidate lacks direct experience in SoC/IP modeling, AI accelerator hardware optimization, or deep-learning workload analysis — core requirements for the Principal Performance Architect role. Their background is predominantly in full-stack web and embedded software development, with no evidence of hardware-software co-design, GPU architecture, or performance modeling for AI accelerators, despite extensive experience in unrelated domains like GIS, CMS, and developer tooling.
strengths: Strong full-stack engineering skills across multiple languages and platforms
Proven experience in performance-critical systems and low-latency applications
Active open-source contributor with demonstrated technical communication skills
concerns: No demonstrated experience with SoC, IP, or AI accelerator modeling
Lacks background in deep learning workload optimization or GPU architecture
Education (BS) and experience (12+ years) don't meet required PhD/Master's equivalency for principal level in this specialized domain
